parameters.formDescription:
Complete this form to schedule sessions for a new client.

Duration fields: Activate applies to all sprints. Crystallize and Combined only apply to the first sprint of each phase (Sprint 1, 5, 9 etc).
Fill Combined ONLY if Lisa is merging Crystallize + Activate into one session — leave blank otherwise.

values.fieldLabel: Crystallize + Activate Combined (mins) — leave blank if separate

parameters.formDescription: Complete this form to reschedule an existing client's sprint sessions.

values.placeholder: Must match exactly — copy from their Trello card or previous email

values.fieldLabel: Reschedule from Sprint # (first sprint to replace)
New Start Date for Rescheduled Sprint

values.placeholder: Paste the current schedule doc link — it will be deleted and replaced
Optional. Format: YYYY-MM-DD, comma separated. e.g. 2026-07-04, 2026-07-05

parameters.name: ={{ ['Vista Caballo | StillPoint Sprint Schedule | Phase ' + $('Form').first().json['Phase Number'], $('Form').first().json['Client Company Name'], $('Form').first().json['Client Full Name']].filter(Boolean).join(' | ') }}

parameters.text:
={{ '@YOUR_TRELLO_USERNAME StillPoint Schedule Generated — ' + $('Form').first().json['Client Full Name'] + '

Lisa, please review the following before we send the email:

Schedule Doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/' + $('Copy file').first().json.id + '/edit

---

Email Draft:

Subject: ' + $('Generate email draft').first().json.subject + '

' + $('Generate email draft').first().json.body + '

---

' }}

nodes.name: Delete rows or columns from sheet

value.Client Drive Folder URL: ={{ $('Filter rows to reschedule').first().json['Client Drive Folder URL']?.trim() }}

parameters.name: ={{ (function() { var phase = $('Filter rows to reschedule').first().json['Phase #']; var company = $('Filter rows to reschedule').first().json['Company Name']; var client = $('Filter rows to reschedule').first().json['Client Name']; return [('Vista Caballo | StillPoint Sprint Schedule | Phase ' + phase), company, client].filter(Boolean).join(' | '); })() }}

folderId.value: ={{ $('Filter rows to reschedule').first().json['Client Drive Folder URL']?.trim().split('/folders/')[1] }}

parameters.text:
={{ '@YOUR_TRELLO_USERNAME Schedule Updated — ' + $('Filter rows to reschedule').first().json['Client Name'] + '

Lisa, please review the updated schedule before ' + $('Form1').first().json['Journey Master Name'] + ' sends the email:

Schedule Doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/' + $('Copy file (Reschedule)').first().json.id + '/edit

---

Email Draft:

Subject: ' + $('Generate email draft (Reschedule)').first().json.subject + '

' + $('Generate email draft (Reschedule)').first().json.body + '

---

' }}

main.node: Delete rows or columns from sheet
